languages.text: "Оперируемая жизнеформа является легко заменимой и не представляет значимой функциональной ценности. Следовательно, установка импланта лишена рационального смысла. Предлагается замещение утраченных функций порошковыми стимуляторами Б-класса. Жизнеформа будет способна к существованию, но ограниченно, что обеспечит ей оптимальный период дожития с сохранением части функциональности".

traits.locale_text: "Консервативное лечение. Замещение нервных функций священными стимуляторами. Единица будет функционировать. Недолго".

languages.text: "The life form on the operating table is easily replaceable and does not possess any substantial functional value. Therefore, installation of the implant would be devoid of sense. Proposing replacement of lost function by means of class-B powder stimulants. The life form will have limited viability and will be gifted an optimal termination period with partial functionality."
languages.original_text: "Оперируемая жизнеформа является легко заменимой и не представляет значимой функциональной ценности. Следовательно, установка импланта лишена рационального смысла. Предлагается замещение утраченных функций порошковыми стимуляторами Б-класса. Жизнеформа будет способна к существованию, но ограниченно, что обеспечит ей оптимальный период дожития с сохранением части функциональности".

Proposing replacement of lost function by means of class-B powder stimulants. The life form will have limited viability and will be gifted an optimal termination period with partial functionality."

Proposing replacement of lost function by means of class-B powder stimulants. The life form will have limited viability and will be gifted an optimal termination period with partial functionality."
"Conservative treatment. Replacement of lost function with class-B powder stimulants. The unit will be serviceable, but limited."

languages.text: 「保存的治療。喪失機能はクラスB粉末刺激剤で代替する。ユニットは運用可能だが、機能は限定的だ」
languages.original_text: "Conservative treatment. Replacement of lost function with class-B powder stimulants. The unit will be serviceable, but limited."

traits.locale_text: 「保存的治療。喪失機能はクラスB粉末刺激剤で代替する。ユニットは運用可能だが、機能は限定的だ。」

languages.text: « L'entité sur la table opératoire est aisément remplaçable et ne présente pas de valeur fonctionnelle significative. L'installation d'un implant n'aurait donc aucun sens. En conséquence, je propose que le remplacement des fonctions perdues soit assuré par des stimulants de classe B en poudre. Sa viabilité étant limitée, l'entité bénéficiera ainsi d'une période de cessation optimale avec des fonctionnalités partielles. »
languages.original_text: "The life form on the operating table is easily replaceable and does not possess any substantial functional value. Therefore, installation of the implant would be devoid of sense. Proposing replacement of lost function by means of class-B powder stimulants. The life form will have limited viability and will be gifted an optimal termination period with partial functionality."

traits.locale_text: « L'entité sur la table opératoire est aisément remplaçable et ne présente pas de valeur fonctionnelle significative. L'installation d'un implant n'aurait donc aucun sens. En conséquence, je propose que le remplacement des fonctions perdues soit assuré par des stimulants de classe B en poudre. Sa viabilité étant limitée, l'entité bénéficiera ainsi d'une période de cessation optimale avec des fonctionnalités partielles. »

languages.text: "Masadaki canlı, kolayca değiştirilebilir olup önemli bir işlevsel değere sahip değildir. Bu nedenle implantın takılması anlamsız olacaktır. Kaybedilen işlevin, B sınıfı toz uyarıcılar yoluyla telafi edilmesi önerilmekte. Canlı sınırlı bir yaşama süresine sahip olacak ve kısmi işlevselliği koruduğu bir dönemde, uygun bir şekilde yaşamına son verilecektir."
languages.original_text: "The life form on the operating table is easily replaceable and does not possess any substantial functional value. Therefore, installation of the implant would be devoid of sense. Proposing replacement of lost function by means of class-B powder stimulants. The life form will have limited viability and will be gifted an optimal termination period with partial functionality."

traits.locale_text: "Masadaki canlı, kolayca değiştirilebilir olup önemli bir işlevsel değere sahip değildir. Bu nedenle implantın takılması anlamsız olacaktır. Kaybedilen işlevin, B sınıfı toz uyarıcılar yoluyla telafi edilmesi önerilmekte. Canlı sınırlı bir yaşama süresine sahip olacak ve kısmi işlevselliği koruduğu bir dönemde, uygun bir şekilde yaşamına son verilecektir."

languages.text: "Die Lebensform auf dem Operationstisch ist leicht zu ersetzen und hat keinen nennenswerten funktionalen Wert. Deshalb würde die Installation des Implantats keinen Sinn ergeben. Empfehle Ersetzung der verlorenen Funktion mit Pulverstimulanzien der Klasse B. Die Lebensform wird eingeschränkt lebensfähig sein und erhält eine optimale Terminierungsperiode mit teilweiser Funktionalität."
languages.original_text: "The life form on the operating table is easily replaceable and does not possess any substantial functional value. Therefore, installation of the implant would be devoid of sense. Proposing replacement of lost function by means of class-B powder stimulants. The life form will have limited viability and will be gifted an optimal termination period with partial functionality."

traits.locale_text: "Die Lebensform auf dem Operationstisch ist leicht zu ersetzen und hat keinen nennenswerten funktionalen Wert. Deshalb würde die Installation des Implantats keinen Sinn ergeben. Empfehle Ersetzung der verlorenen Funktion mit Pulverstimulanzien der Klasse B. Die Lebensform wird eingeschränkt lebensfähig sein und erhält eine optimale Terminierungsperiode mit teilweiser Funktionalität."

languages.text: «La forma de vida de la mesa de operación es fácilmente sustituible y no posee un valor funcional suficiente. Por lo tanto, instalar el implante carecería de sentido. Propongo la restitución de las funciones perdidas mediante estimulantes en polvo de clase B. La forma de vida tendrá una viabilidad limitada y se le otorgará un período de expiración óptimo con funcionalidad limitada».
languages.original_text: "The life form on the operating table is easily replaceable and does not possess any substantial functional value. Therefore, installation of the implant would be devoid of sense. Proposing replacement of lost function by means of class-B powder stimulants. The life form will have limited viability and will be gifted an optimal termination period with partial functionality."

traits.locale_text: «La forma de vida de la mesa de operación es fácilmente sustituible y no posee un valor funcional suficiente. Por lo tanto, instalar el implante carecería de sentido. Propongo la restitución de las funciones perdidas mediante estimulantes en polvo de clase B. La forma de vida tendrá una viabilidad limitada y se le otorgará un período de expiración óptimo con funcionalidad limitada».

languages.text: “手术台上的这个生命体具备高度可替代性，不具备实质的功能价值。因此，为其安装植入物毫无意义。建议使用B级粉末兴奋剂替代丧失的功能。该生命体的剩余寿命将十分有限，但可以保留部分功能发挥最后的价值。”
languages.original_text: "The life form on the operating table is easily replaceable and does not possess any substantial functional value. Therefore, installation of the implant would be devoid of sense. Proposing replacement of lost function by means of class-B powder stimulants. The life form will have limited viability and will be gifted an optimal termination period with partial functionality."
